stemHtml: The controller has changed your call sign from ABC 123 to ABC 999. Which statement is correct regarding reverting back to your original call sign?

options.a: The change is temporary and used in the current airspace, you should expect to revert to your flight plan call sign at the boundary of airspace.
options.b: You should revert back automatically at the boundary of airspace.
options.c: It is a temporary change for 20 minutes.
options.d: It is a permanent change and will not be reverted to the flight plan call sign until landing.
